# 🧠 Memory Atlas: Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline

The following diagram illustrates the `knowledge_matrix` vector flow from raw documentation into the semantic memory system.

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Documentation Source] -->|Extract| B(Chiral Formalizer)
    B -->|Convert| C[Knowledge Matrix]
    C -->|Embed| D{Vector Store}
    D -->|Query/Recall| E[Myelin System]
    E -->|Align| F[ADCCL Gate]
    F -->|Verified State| G[Master Ledger]
```
